name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient contract management causes missed discounts. We provide a streamlined procurement contract management system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Etsy sellers face challenges in managing vendor contracts effectively.
